creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mezz        2007-01-04 19:29:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-wm/fluxbox-devel Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update fb-doc-mfhtml.tgz and fluxbook.pdf to 2006-06-29. [1]
  - Self host the fb-doc-mfhtml.tgz and fluxbook.pdf in my freefall account.
    Renamed both to foobar-YYYYMMDD.[tgz|pdf] to avoid force users to do the
    'make distclean' at the every time and reduce fail fetch due to mismatch of
    checksum.
  - Bump the PORTREVISION.
  
  PR:             ports/107513 [1]
  Submitted by:   Jonathan Liu <Net147@hotmail.com> [1]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.61      +9 -6      ports/x11-wm/fluxbox-devel/Makefile
  1.40      +6 -6      ports/x11-wm/fluxbox-devel/distinfo
  1.26      +63 -25    ports/x11-wm/fluxbox-devel/pkg-plist
